command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
JOB_ID="job-20260625T053228Z-16ca7671"

echo '=== RUNNER LOG ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/${JOB_ID}.runner.log 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo '=== CURRENT JOB STATE ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/$JOB_ID/ 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo '=== CURRENT.JSON ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/current.json 2>/dev/null" 2>&1

echo '=== ACTIVE PROCESSES ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ps aux | grep -E 'moreno|delegat' | grep -v grep" 2>&1

echo DONE_1913
